description:
Smart. Focused. Email.

Fast, cross-platform email designed to filter out the noise - so you can focus on what's important.
We’ve improved sync stability for Spark for Teams by fixing a rare case where shared content such as comments and threads, might not sync correctly without restarting the app.
More improvements:
- Improved AI Summary language handling for translated emails.
- Added editing and rich formatting options for Meeting Notes.
If you have any questions, ideas, or encounter any issues, please contact us at support@sparkmailapp.com
P.S. If you encounter any issues with the automatic update, please use the following link to download the update manually:
https://downloads.sparkmailapp.com/Spark3/win/dist/3.24.4.112445/Spark.exe
